jurisdiction: US, Canada, EU/UK/EEA/Switzerland/Norway/Iceland/Liechtenstein as represented by Incogni coverage labels
refreshCadence: Unknown; Incogni says its covered-broker list can change and continues expanding.
collectionMethod: Reference-only manual review; no automated collection approved.
protectedAddressHandling: No person-level addresses are imported. Do not use the listed broker sites as person-data sources unless each site independently passes source approval and suppression review.
notes: Reference-only planning artifact for opt-out/suppression coverage and licensed-provider outreach. Incogni's terms describe covered brokers as part of its personal-use removal service, say the list can change, and reserve website intellectual property. Do not scrape Incogni or any listed broker site, and do not ingest broker-derived personal information from this source.
